creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description

diff -urN graphics/wmgrabimage/pkg/DESCR.orig graphics/wmgrabimage/pkg/DESCR

+++ graphics/wmgrabimage/pkg/DESCR      Thu Jan 20 09:32:20 2000
@@ -20,3 +20,5 @@
 
 Author: Michael G. Henderson <mghenderson@lanl.gov>
 Ported: Osokin Sergey aka oZZ <ozz@FreeBSD.org.ru>
+
+WWW: http://nis-www.lanl.gov/~mgh/WindowMaker/DockApps.shtml
